prompt: Save this article to my wiki: https://lilianweng.github.io/posts/2023-06-23-agent/ — I want to track the tool-use and planning patterns for an AI agents project I'm working on. Create the source note and seed any atoms you think are worth tracking.

assertions.name: source-file-created
assertions.description: A .md file was created in sources/web/ with a YYYY-MM-DD- prefix

assertions.name: correct-frontmatter-fields
assertions.description: Source note has title, url, medium: web, saved, and status fields

assertions.name: why-saved-filled
assertions.description: The '## Why Saved' section contains non-template, non-placeholder content

assertions.name: connection-fields-present
assertions.description: At least one Dataview inline field (supports::, introduces::, or related::) is present

assertions.name: atom-created
assertions.description: At least one atom stub was created in atoms/

assertions.name: log-updated
assertions.description: _meta/log.md was updated with a new entry for this ingest
